Instant Access Technology

One scan.
The complete picture.

MediSafe-ID bracelets embed both a permanent QR code and an NFC chip directly into the band. When seconds count, a first responder opens their standard camera app, holds it to your wrist, and your full emergency profile is on screen — no application to download, no account to log into, nothing standing between them and the information they need.

  • Compatible with the native camera on every modern iPhone and Android device
  • NFC tap access provides a reliable fallback in any environment
  • Full profile rendered in under 5 seconds from scan to screen
  • Globally distributed infrastructure — accessible even in low-connectivity areas
  • Your QR code is permanent, unchanging, and always linked to your live profile
Allergies & Medications

Critical health data,
front and center

Severe allergies surface at the top of your profile in bold red — impossible to miss in an emergency. Every medication is listed with dosage so first responders know exactly what you're taking before they administer treatment. Our platform cross-references everything — with AI-powered analysis built into our roadmap from day one.

  • Severity-coded allergy tracking — Severe to Mild
  • Specific reaction type listed per allergen
  • Complete medication list with dosage and frequency
  • Smart interaction flags between your meds and allergies

AI-Powered Platform

Your health data,
intelligently organized.

MediSafe-ID is built as an AI-powered platform from the ground up. Phase 1 delivers structured, cross-referenced medication and allergy data — organized intelligently so first responders get exactly what they need. Our full AI engine, including one-to-one drug interaction analysis and real-time environmental monitoring, rolls out as we scale. The data we collect in Phase 1 is exactly what makes that AI valuable.

  • Structured drug & allergy data — every prescription and allergy organized for instant first-responder access
  • Allergy conflict detection — flags medications that contain ingredients you're allergic to
  • Instant results — analysis runs in real time, no waiting, no delay
  • Proactive alerts — notified when a new medication could conflict with your existing profile
  • Dietary conflict warnings — foods and supplements that react with your medications
  • Location-aware advisories — environmental alerts when conditions affect your health profile

QR + NFC Bracelet

One bracelet, two access methods. First responders use whichever is fastest — camera or NFC tap. No download ever required.

5-Second Access

From scan to full profile in under 5 seconds. Every field is optimized for emergency readability — not a cluttered medical record.

Interaction Intelligence

Your medications and allergies are cross-referenced and structured intelligently. Full AI-powered interaction analysis rolls out with our Phase 2 platform update.

Local Health Alerts

Environmental monitoring — pollen counts, air quality, viral activity correlated with your profile — is part of our Phase 2 AI rollout.

Privacy Controls

Granular control over what is visible publicly versus to verified emergency responders. Your data operates entirely on your terms.

Scan Analytics

A complete log of every time your profile was accessed — timestamp, location, and access method. Full transparency into your data.

How It Works

5 minutes to set up.
A lifetime of protection.

One profile. One bracelet. Any emergency — handled. Here's exactly how it works from start to finish.

01
Takes 5 minutes

Build your medical profile

Create your free account and fill in what matters — allergies, medications, blood type, conditions, emergency contacts. Every field you complete is a field a first responder doesn't have to guess. It goes live the moment you save, and you can update it from any device, anytime.

Allergies — food, meds, environmental
Medications with dosage & frequency
Blood type & chronic conditions
Emergency contacts — notified instantly
02
Ships to your door

Wear your bracelet

Your bracelet arrives pre-linked to your live profile — no setup required. Slip it on. Forget it's there. It's waterproof, has no battery to charge, never expires, and never fails. Available in three colors to match your style. The most important thing you'll ever wear.

QR code — any camera, any phone
NFC chip — one tap, instant access
Waterproof — shower, swim, sweat
No battery — zero maintenance, ever
03
In an emergency

Responders scan. You're saved.

A paramedic arrives. A police officer finds you. An ER nurse needs to know what you're allergic to — right now. They scan or tap your bracelet. Your full profile loads in under 5 seconds. No app. No login. No delay. The right information, in the right hands, at the right moment.

FAQ

Everything you need to know

256-bit AES Encrypted
SOC 2 Type II
Who can see my medical profile? +

You control exactly what's visible. By default, only the information you mark as public is shown to anyone who scans your bracelet. Sensitive details like your full address or insurance information can be restricted to verified emergency responders only. You can update your privacy settings at any time from your portal.

What happens if I lose my bracelet? +

If your bracelet is lost or stolen, you can immediately deactivate it from your portal with one click — your profile becomes inaccessible via that bracelet instantly. Order a replacement and your existing profile links to the new bracelet automatically. Your data is never at risk.

Does the bracelet need charging or batteries? +

No. The QR code is permanently laser-engraved — it never fades or requires power. The NFC chip is passive, meaning it draws power from the scanning device rather than a battery. Your bracelet works forever with zero maintenance.

Does the first responder need an app or account? +

Never. First responders use their standard phone camera to scan the QR code — the profile opens instantly in any browser. NFC tap works the same way. No app, no account, no delay. The system is designed so that any phone in the world can access your profile.

Can I use MediSafe-ID for a child or elderly parent? +

Absolutely. You can manage profiles for family members from a single account. Many users set up MediSafe-ID for elderly parents, children with allergies, or family members with complex conditions. The caregiver view lets you update any profile in your family group from anywhere.

For Investors
Platform Positioning

MediSafe-ID is not a medical ID bracelet.
It is a real-time health intelligence platform.

One that begins with the wearable and builds toward the most comprehensive AI-powered medical data network ever built for the individual — accelerated by AI-native health platforms and post-pandemic care digitization.

The infrastructure
beneath emergency medicine.

The Problem

Remembering your medications and allergies is hard — and when it matters most, no one knows

Whether you're traveling across the country or just going about your day, keeping track of your medications and allergies is a real challenge. And if something happens to you, how would a first responder ever know? There's no reliable way to carry that information — until now.

Traveling with medications is stressful — new doctors, new pharmacies, and no way to instantly share your full medication history.
Severe allergies go unknown — in an emergency, a first responder has no way of knowing what could kill you before it's too late.
First responders arrive blind — no medication list, no allergy history, no emergency contacts. Critical decisions get made without the information that could save your life.
The AI Moat

Phase 1 builds the dataset. Phase 2 turns it into an AI moat.

We're not bolting AI on top — we're building the proprietary dataset in Phase 1 that makes the AI valuable in Phase 2. Every user profile we collect is structured medical data that trains our interaction engine. By the time we raise seed, we'll have real-world data competitors can't replicate. That's a compounding moat that deepens with every signup.

Drug Interaction Engine
Phase 1: structured medication data collection. Phase 2: live AI cross-referencing against contraindication databases.
Dosage Intelligence
Dosage and frequency data captured in Phase 1 — AI validation against regional guidelines launches in Phase 2.
Environmental Monitoring
Environmental correlation with user profiles — part of our Phase 2 AI release, powered by Phase 1 data.
Data Flywheel
Every Phase 1 user generates structured medical data that trains our Phase 2 AI — the flywheel starts now.
Product Roadmap
Phase 1 — Launching Q2–Q3 2026
AI Medical Bracelet

The MediSafe-ID bracelet — embedded QR and NFC, linked to a live AI-powered medical profile. Drug interaction analysis, dosage validation, and location-aware health advisories from day one.

QR + NFC Bracelet AI Platform (Phase 2) Live Health Profile
Phase 2 — Roadmap
Healthcare Integration

Direct EHR integration with hospital systems, physician networks, and insurance providers. Profiles update automatically from clinical records — eliminating manual data entry and enabling real-time accuracy.

EHR Sync Hospital API Provider Network
Phase 3 — Roadmap
Predictive Intelligence

AI that moves beyond reactive analysis to predictive intervention — identifying medication risks, treatment gaps, and environmental threats before they escalate. The platform becomes a proactive health guardian.

Predictive AI Risk Modeling Proactive Alerts

Our Team

The team building it.

Joachim Martin
Founder & Quant Researcher
Finance Statistics & CS AI & ML Statistics

Joachim Martin was born on July 7, 2007 in Connecticut and is pursuing a B.S. in Finance with a minor in Statistics and Computer Science at the University of Connecticut.

Founder of VirtuFlore Infrastructure, a quantitative financial research company integrating advanced statistical models with AI for large-scale alpha prediction and financial forecasting.

Chad Henninger
Educator, Author & Entrepreneur
Biology & Pre-Med Education Authorship Innovation

Chad Henninger was born on January 16, 1970 in Miami, Oklahoma. He holds a Master's Degree from East Central University and served as a professional educator and coach for 12 years.

Author of the Happy Tail Tales children's book series and founder of several charities and medical devices — a lifelong commitment to community and innovation.
